text: Class counsel used multiple AI tools to draft and cross-check a class settlement approval brief. The filing contained fabricated quotations from real cases and at least one nonexistent case, and a corrected filing failed to remove the hallucinations.
ai_system_name: Six unspecified AI tools used concurrently
deployer: Plaintiff class counsel in Vuori wage-and-hour case
canonical_source_conflicted: Actual case law and settlement approval standards
mitigation_gap: AI tools were used to verify each other instead of checking legal databases; corrected filing did not correct false authority.
reliance_or_harm: Settlement motions were struck; counsel was found inadequate as class counsel; class settlement collapsed into individual resolution.
